name: Privora European Infrastructure Fund I
description: A diversified portfolio of European infrastructure assets including renewable energy, digital infrastructure, and transport. Targets stable, inflation-linked cash flows over a 10-year horizon under ELTIF 2.0 regulations.

name: Privora Private Credit Opportunities Fund
description: Senior secured direct lending to mid-market European companies. Floating rate exposure provides natural inflation hedging with quarterly income distributions and a 7-year fund life.

name: Privora Real Estate Core Europe Fund
description: Core and core-plus real estate across office, logistics, and residential sectors in Western Europe. Low volatility income strategy targeting capital preservation and steady distributions.

name: Privora Growth Equity Fund II
description: Growth equity investments in European technology and healthcare companies at Series B to pre-IPO stages. Higher return potential with a 10-year lock-up, qualifying under ELTIF 2.0 for retail distribution.

name: Privora Sustainable Forestry & Agriculture Fund
description: Long-duration natural capital strategy investing in certified sustainable forestry and agricultural land across Northern and Central Europe. Low correlation to public markets with tangible ESG impact credentials.
